fault_description: Unusual high-pitched noise from drive-end bearing during startup, vibration reading elevated on handheld meter
action_taken: Bearing inspected and found pitted; replaced drive-end bearing

fault_description: Minor seal weep observed during routine round
LAH-102 high level alarm triggered twice during night shift
Outlet temperature (TI-104) trending 15 degC below setpoint
Valve hunting - oscillating between 40-55% opening under steady flow demand
Pump tripped on high vibration interlock, DE bearing again showing elevated temperature
action_taken: Switched to standby P-101B; P-101A pulled for full bearing and alignment overhaul

fault_description: Standby pump started on trip of P-101A
Scheduled annual pop test due per OISD-STD-130 schedule
Minor external corrosion noted near lower nozzle during walkdown
action_taken: Surface prep and touch-up coating applied; flagged for next internal inspection

fault_description: Third bearing failure in 4 months on same pump - suspect misalignment root cause
action_taken: Laser alignment performed on motor-pump coupling; found 0.4mm angular misalignment corrected

fault_description: Routine housekeeping - minor external coating touch-up
Flow reading drifting compared to mass balance reconciliation

parts_replaced: Tubes cleaned; sample sent for lab analysis of fouling deposit; upstream filtration recommended

fault_description: Scheduled monthly standby pump run test
Minor seat leak suspected during routine inspection round
action_taken: Scheduled for bench test and reseat
